assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1, 2, 3 have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Tasks 4, 5, 6, 7 have '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'. That is 3 backend tasks and 4 frontend tasks.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1, 2, 3. Frontend tasks are numbered 4, 5, 6, 7. Task 4 (frontend) depends on Task 2 (backend). Task 5 depends on Task 4. Task 6 depends on Task 5. Task 7 depends on Tasks 5 and 6. All backend tasks have lower numbers than any frontend task that depends on them.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (SbomComparePage) extensively references Figma design with specific PatternFly components: 'Select (single, typeahead) for SBOM selectors', 'ExpandableSection for each diff section', 'Badge for count badges — color varies by section: green for Added/Resolved, red for Removed/New Vulnerabilities, blue for Version Changes, yellow for License Changes', 'Table (composable) for data tables', 'EmptyState' with 'CodeBranchIcon', 'Skeleton for loading state placeholders', 'Dropdown for the Export button'. Task 6 also references PatternFly: 'PatternFly 5's Table (composable) supports row selection via checkbox' and 'ToolbarItem component'.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (frontend, trustify-ui) has '## Dependencies\n- Depends on: Task 2 — SBOM comparison REST endpoint (backend must define the API contract)'. Task 2 is a backend task (trustify-backend).

Frontend task 4 references paths from repo-frontend.md: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/api/client.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts'. Frontend task 5 references: 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/SbomDetailPage.tsx', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/utils/severityUtils.ts'. Task 2 modifies: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md line 48). Creates: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs' — new file in existing directory. Task 4 modifies: 'src/api/models.ts' (in repo-frontend.md line 25), 'src/api/rest.ts' (in repo-frontend.md line 26). Creates: 'src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts' — new file in existing src/hooks/ directory. Task 5 modifies: 'src/routes.tsx' (in repo-frontend.md line 53). Creates new files under 'src/pages/SbomComparePage/' — new page directory following existing page pattern. Task 6 modifies: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' (in repo-frontend.md line 33). Task 7 modifies: 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts' (in repo-frontend.md line 60), 'tests/mocks/fixtures/sboms.json' (in repo-frontend.md line 62). Creates: 'tests/e2e/sbom-compare.spec.ts' — new file in existing tests/e2e/ directory, 'tests/mocks/fixtures/sbom-comparison.json' — new file in existing fixtures/ directory. All existing paths match repo manifests; new files are in directories that exist in the manifests.
